content.speakerText: How do I log into the expense system? I forgot my password.
content.speakerTextCn: 报销系统怎么登录？我忘记密码了。
expectedAnswers: You can reset it by clicking 'Forgot Password' on the login page.
Just go to the company intranet and use your work email — if you’ve forgotten your password, click 'Reset Password'.
The system is on the internal portal. I can email you the direct link, and then you can reset your password using your work email.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确提供了密码重置或登录路径
语言准确性：是否正确使用了 'intranet', 'work email', 'Forgot Password' 等关键词
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化、自然的表达方式，如 'Just click...' 或 'I can send you...'
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少两个核心术语（如：intranet, work email, reset password）

content.speakerText: I tried logging in but got an error. Where should I go?
content.speakerTextCn: 我尝试登录但出了错误，我该去哪里？
expectedAnswers: Go to the company intranet and look for the Expense System link.
You need to be on the office network — try accessing it from your work computer.
Check if you’re using your work email, and make sure you’re connected to the company network.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否准确指出访问入口（内网）或解决登录错误的建议
语言准确性：是否正确使用 'intranet', 'work email', 'company network' 等术语
表达自然度：是否使用了自然的口语表达，如 'Try accessing it from...' 或 'Check if you're using...'
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少两个场景关键词

content.speakerText: I'm new here. Can you tell me how to access the expense system?
content.speakerTextCn: 我是新员工，你能告诉我怎么访问报销系统吗？
expectedAnswers: Sure! Just go to the company intranet, find the Expense System, and log in with your work email. If you don’t know your password, click 'Forgot Password'.
The system is on our internal portal. I’ll email you the link right away — use your work email to log in.
Welcome! You need to be on the office network. Your login is your work email address. I can help you reset your password if needed.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否完整提供了登录路径、邮箱要求和密码重置方式
语言准确性：是否正确使用了 'intranet', 'work email', 'Forgot Password' 等核心表达
表达自然度：是否语气友好、结构清晰，符合职场新人指导场景
关键词覆盖：是否包含全部三个核心术语（intranet, work email, reset password）
